pregame_model_read.closing_market_observed: 5+ moved from +139 entry to approximately +128 pregame
pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: Not a pure dominance profile, but a strong price-gap opportunity with enough leash and strike efficiency to clear 5+ if early command held.

pitch_notes.sinker: 52 pitches, 4 K, 40% CSW, 77% strike rate; primary runway and strike-stealing pitch
pitch_notes.slider: 21 pitches, 2 K, 38% CSW; best secondary putaway offering
pitch_notes.changeup: 13 pitches, 38% CSW; useful contact suppressor vs opposite-handed hitters

what_worked: The model correctly identified that the plus-money price overstated failure probability.
McDonald's strike efficiency preserved deep enough runway to clear the number.
72% strike rate and 79% first-pitch strike rate stabilized the outing.
Sinker-slider sequencing generated enough called strikes to support the ladder.
what_to_keep: PRICE_DISLOCATION_K_EDGE classification for young pitchers with stable strike efficiency.
Leash/runway evaluation as a stronger factor than raw strikeout upside.
Positive CLV tracking on plus-money strikeout ladders.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: Increase confidence weighting when a developing SP demonstrates elite strike efficiency and first-pitch strike control despite only moderate raw whiff rates.

notes: Trevor McDonald exceeded the 5+ threshold with 6 strikeouts. The wager succeeded through command stability, strike efficiency, and leash preservation rather than overpowering whiff dominance. This validates the LIVE-FLOW price-dislocation framework for selective plus-money strikeout ladders.
